title: Joint Bluetooth and MIOTY Localisation Module
description: Low-power localization tag combining BLE short-range tracking and mioty long-range fallback in a single 2.4 GHz transceiver. Custom circular PCB, 9-axis IMU, coin-cell powered.

title: JESD204C Clock Tree — M.Sc. Thesis
description: Experimental characterization, SPI-controlled reconfiguration, and optimization of JESD204C clock trees using the LMX1205 PLL and HMC7043 distributor. Targets deterministic latency and minimum jitter for multi-channel ADC/DAC systems.

title: 7nm FinFET Standard Cell Library
kicker: 7NM FINFET · ASAP7 PDK · STANDARD CELL LIBRARY
description: Designed and assessed a 7nm FinFET standard cell library using the ASAP7 PDK. Adaptable logic gates, optimized layouts, minimal footprint, and radiation hardening analysis for space applications.

title: Smart Home Automation + UPS
description: Automatic LED emergency lamp with an online UPS for low-power household appliances. Full circuit design, simulation, testing, and IoT integration for remote monitoring.

title: Landmine Detection Robot
description: Remotely-driven robot that detects buried landmines with dual inductive proximity sensors, tags the find with GPS, and SMS-alerts a bomb squad over GSM. Wireless camera for navigation.
